data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of skipping individual occurrences, but the evidence provided does not confirm this functionality. The linked use case describes a recurring subscription model but does not explicitly mention the ability to skip individual occurrences as a feature. This constitutes a gap in the requirement as the evidence does not support the expected result of the exploratory step.
gaps: The ability to skip individual occurrences is not explicitly covered in the linked use case.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define API for skipping occurrences
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API allows skipping individual occurrences of the subscription.
